title: AI Alignment
intro: We align AI capabilities to your mission, governance, and risk posture—never as experiments, always as engineered outcomes.
imageAlt: AI governance for broadband mapping and geospatial data quality

cards.title: Governance & Controls
cards.body: Frameworks that keep AI initiatives compliant, auditable, and ethically aligned.

cards.title: Mission Use Cases
cards.body: Identifying and engineering AI use cases that directly support mission outcomes.

cards.title: Systems Integration
cards.body: Safely integrating AI components into existing architectures without compromising reliability.

cards.title: Geospatial AI Governance
cards.body: Auditable, explainable AI governance for geospatial datasets driving broadband mapping and public funding decisions.

cards.title: Platform-Agnostic AI Integration
cards.body: We design AI solutions that are platform-agnostic by default, with optional Palantir Foundry and AIP integration when mission requirements demand trusted, enterprise-grade AI infrastructure.
